headline: AMD stock climbs after Microsoft expands Azure AI partnership
summary: Advanced Micro Devices (NASDAQ:AMD) shares gained 5% on Monday after Microsoft announced a major expansion of its strategic partnership with the chipmaker, positioning AMD’s latest AI hardware as a key component of Azure’s next-generation cloud infrastructure. At the centre of the agreement is Microsoft’s large-scale adoption of the AMD Helios Rackscale Solution, which will support frontier AI model inference across Azure cloud services and enterprise workloads.

headline: Bezos Backs AI Startup to Discover New Materials for Chipmaking
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Producing the world’s most in-demand semiconductors requires enormous amounts of energy and access to rare minerals. CuspAI, a two-year-old British startup, has raised nearly half a billion dollars on its bet that artificial intelligence can improve that process. headline: Cathie Wood sells $11.7 million of tumbling semiconductor stock
summary: Cathie Wood, head of Ark Investment Management, has built a reputation for backing artificial intelligence stocks. But even her highest-conviction holdings aren't immune to profit-taking. That's exactly what she's doing with AMD this week, selling more shares after the chipmaker's recent pullback. ...

headline: Dow Jones Futures: Oil Prices Rise Amid Iran News; Google, Tesla Ahead
summary: Dow Jones futures: Iran attacks killed three U.S. servicemembers. Google earnings and capex guidance will be key this week. Tesla, Intel, GE Vernova also report.
